testcase.name: test_get_livescores

failure.message: assert 'data' in {'message': "No result(s) found matching your request. Either the query did not return any results or you don't have access to it via your current subscription.", 'rate_limit': {'remaining': 2979, 'requested_entity': 'Fixture', 'resets_in_seconds': 3403}, 'subscription': [{'add_ons': [], 'meta': [], 'plans': [{'category': 'Standard', 'plan': 'Football Free Plan', 'sport': 'Football'}, {'category': 'Standard', 'plan': 'Cricket Free Plan', 'sport': 'Cricket'}], 'widgets': []}], 'timezone': 'UTC'}
